title: Section 67
content: 1[67. Act to have overriding effect.--The provisions of this Act shall have effect, notwithstanding anything inconsistent therewith contained in any other law for the time being in force.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 43 of 2016, s. 10, for sections 7 and 8 (w.e.f. 1-11-2016).
